title: Lemon Ricotta Pancakes
summary: Fluffy pancakes with bright lemon zest and creamy ricotta.
instructions: Whisk dry ingredients. Mix wet ingredients separately, then combine gently. Cook on a lightly oiled skillet until golden on both sides.

title: Herbed Tomato Pasta
summary: Weeknight pasta with garlic, basil, and cherry tomatoes.
instructions: Boil pasta until al dente. Sauté garlic in olive oil, add tomatoes, then toss with pasta, basil, salt, and pepper.

title: Crispy Chickpea Salad
summary: A crunchy, protein-packed lunch bowl with lemon tahini dressing.
instructions: Roast chickpeas until crisp. Whisk tahini with lemon juice and water. Assemble greens and vegetables, top with chickpeas and dressing.

title: Berry Yogurt Parfait
summary: Layered yogurt parfait with berries and toasted granola.
instructions: Layer yogurt, berries, and granola in glasses. Repeat layers and finish with a drizzle of honey.
